topStories.headline: FOMC Decision Day: Warsh Press Conference at 2PM ET — Tone Shift Is the Real Story
topStories.summary: Kevin Warsh chairs his first FOMC decision today; a rate hold at 3.50–3.75% is near-certain (97%+ market-implied), but markets are focused on whether Warsh signals a shift from easing bias to neutral or tighter language.
topStories.marketImpact: USD and bond yields will react sharply to tone; equities ↓ risk on hawkish pivot; SPX 7,511 and NDX 26,376 both vulnerable entering the session

topStories.headline: Bank of Japan Hiked to 1% — Highest Rate Since 1995 — Signals More to Come
topStories.summary: The BOJ raised its benchmark rate 25bps to 1.0% on June 16 in a 7-1 decision without hospitalised Governor Ueda, marking the highest rate since 1995, and signalled further hikes on the table.
topStories.marketImpact: JPY strengthened to 160.22 vs USD ↑; JGB 10Y rose to 2.615% ↑; Japanese financials ↑; yen carry trades ↓; Nikkei futures under pressure

topStories.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) Surges 50%+ Post-IPO, Overtakes Amazon as World's 5th Largest Company
topStories.summary: SpaceX shares hit ~$201 in three sessions since the record $75B IPO at $135 on June 12, pushing market cap to ~$2.65T and dethroning Amazon from 5th largest globally.
topStories.marketImpact: SPCX ↑ (momentum vs. profit-taking risk on triple witching day); AMZN sentiment watch; broad mega-cap index re-weighting underway

topStories.headline: Chipmakers Lead Nasdaq Down 1.15% — AMD -7%, Micron -6%, Broadcom -4%, Nvidia -2%
topStories.summary: Tech/semiconductor stocks rotated sharply lower Monday; Nasdaq Composite dropped 1.15% to 26,376 and S&P fell 0.57% to 7,511, while the Dow hit a record 51,999 on cyclical rotation.
topStories.marketImpact: SOX ↓; semi stocks face further pressure on Fed day and triple witching; Dow cyclicals ↑

topStories.headline: US-Iran Peace Deal Formal Signing Set for June 19 — Brent Slides to ~$79/bbl
topStories.summary: The preliminary US-Iran deal announced June 15 to end hostilities and reopen the Strait of Hormuz continues to weigh on oil; formal signing in Switzerland is June 19.
topStories.marketImpact: Brent crude ↓ ~$79/bbl (down ~5%+ since deal announcement); energy majors ↓; airlines and consumer discretionary ↑

topStories.headline: BofA Market-Top Checklist at 70%; Rate Cuts Fully Priced Out for 2026 as CPI Hits 4.2%
topStories.summary: Bank of America's pre-peak indicator triggered 70% of historical warning signals as May CPI printed 4.2% YoY and consumer sentiment collapsed; CME FedWatch shows zero probability of a 2026 rate cut.
topStories.marketImpact: Macro risk premium rising ↑; defensive sectors watch; growth/tech ↓ on rate-for-longer fears; credit spreads to watch

companiesToWatch.name: Space Exploration Technologies
companiesToWatch.reason: Post-IPO surge ~50% above $135 issue price in 3 sessions at ~$2.65T market cap; triple witching today adds intraday volatility — watch for momentum vs. profit-taking.

companiesToWatch.name: Nvidia
companiesToWatch.reason: Dropped 2%+ in the chip rotation on June 16; Fed day and triple witching add near-term pressure even as long-run AI demand thesis remains intact.

companiesToWatch.name: Advanced Micro Devices
companiesToWatch.reason: Led the chip selloff at -7% on June 16; watch for reversal vs. continued downside on quarterly derivatives expiry and Fed decision volatility.

companiesToWatch.name: Exxon Mobil
companiesToWatch.reason: Brent sliding to ~$79/bbl as US-Iran Hormuz deal gets priced in; direct revenue headwind with formal signing June 19 still ahead.

companiesToWatch.name: Jabil Inc.
companiesToWatch.reason: Serenity's ongoing CPO/1.6T transceiver thesis gaining retail traction; AI photonics bottleneck play to watch as chip sector rotation creates relative value.

latestPicks.thesis: Positioned as 'the next TSEM' at ~$1.4B market cap; competing for H2 2027 CPO scale-up inflection; thesis recently re-affirmed by Serenity.
Market not pricing Jabil's 1.6T LRO pluggable-transceiver business; ~40% rerating potential by H1 2027 as hyperscaler CPO deployments scale.
CW laser supplier for Jabil, Ayar, POET, and Marvell — framed as the chokepoint light source for CPO/Silicon Photonics; called 'the next $LITE'.
CPO/silicon photonics foundry chokepoint; consistently called one of the 'safest' long-term compounders in photonics supply chain.

priorPickMoves.move: Jumped 70–77% in a single session on May 27 after Serenity's original post (confirmed by Bloomberg).
Up 165% in one week following the Jabil partnership thesis and Serenity coverage.

serenity.sentiment: Highly positive and viral — 500K+ followers on X, featured by Lookonchain, Futunn, and Odaily. Self-reported 2026 YTD return of +4,502% (unaudited). Some analyst scepticism around unverified figures; retail enthusiasm remains very high.

quickHits: Triple witching today (June 17): Quarterly expiration of stock options, index futures, and single-stock futures — expect elevated intraday volatility and heavy volume (CBOE)
China's Commerce Ministry signals desire to cap US tariffs at Kuala Lumpur summit agreed levels; US-China Board of Trade public comment period now open (Bloomberg)
USTR proposed 10–12.5% new tariffs on 60 economies over forced labor practices, including China, EU, and Japan (CNBC)
Gold holding near $4,333/oz — risk-off from chip selloff partially offsets Iran deal optimism (Fortune)
